message:
feat: add conformance tests + fix center padding for string operations

Add conformance test cases and dispatch handlers for:
- center, ljust, rjust, zfill (justification)
- join (character separator)
- expandtabs (tab expansion)
- index, rindex (throwing find variants)

Fix center() padding calculation to match Python's str.center behavior:
uses formula `left = marg / 2 + (marg & width & 1)` which adds extra
padding to left when both margin and width are odd.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
